RULING: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, MAINTAINING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to maintain the trial date with preference is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 36(e). No opposition. The February 27, 2017 trial date is maintained with preference status. The January 14, 2019 return holding date is vacated and the new trial date is April 29, 2019 11:15a.m. in Department 503. Discovery remains closed. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is May 9, 2019. All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the February 27, 2017 trial date.

Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than March 15, 2019. Responses to the demand are due no later than March 29, 2019. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers. These confidential demands must be submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by April 22, 2019 at 2:00p.m. Mandatory settlement conference with only the attorneys present and final decision makers available by phone is set for Thursday, April 25, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in 603.
